title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 139.180 - No additional delinquent lists
text:
139.180.  No additional delinquent lists. — No collector shall be permitted to return, and no county commission shall be allowed to receive, any additional delinquent lists, and the director of revenue shall not give credit for any such additional delinquent lists allowed by any county commission.
(RSMo 1939 § 11090, A.L. 1945 p. 1907, A. 1949 S.B. 1024) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9919; 1919 § 12911; 1909 § 11465
